inputs.text: 章邯, Qin-Han transition period, late Qin general under severe military pressure, historically complex rather than villainous, black Qin military armor, restrained bronze fittings, commander cloak, Qin army formation, war chariot elements, black Qin banners, dusty campaign command post, maps and bamboo orders, stern tired expression, burdened by command, realistic and human, semi-realistic guofeng card illustration, ancient book paper grain, bronze and stone texture, dark mobile card palette, low-saturation gold accents, cinematic lighting, vertical 3:4 composition, no card frame baked into the art
